body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Birth/Body** (Phase 1) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Birth/Body to mechanistic neuroscience through Out-of-body-induced, hippocampal, amnesia..

**Out-of-body-induced hippocampal amnesia.** — Proc Natl Acad Sci U S A. PMID: 24616529. DOI: 10.1073/pnas.1318801111. Theoretical models have suggested an association between the ongoing experience of the world from the perspective of one'sown body and hippocampus-based episodic memory. This link has been supported by clinical reports of long-term episodic memory impairments in psychiatric conditions with dissociative symptoms, in which individuals feel detached from themselves as if having an out-of-body experience.
